steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Divide both sides by negative two.
$$|x-7|=4x$$
Since the left side is nonnegative,
$$x\ge 0$$

steps.title: Use the valid branch
steps.content:
For a nonnegative solution less than $7$, use this branch.
$$|x-7|=7-x$$
$$7-x=4x$$
$$7=5x$$
$$x=\frac{7}{5}$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Graph the equation and read the single intersection's $x$-value.
The answer is B.
